channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Karoline Leavitt Returns from Maternity Leave to Lead White House Briefing
Trump Administration Launches Tool to Detect FAFSA Fraud in Real Time
item.description: The administration has introduced a real-time fraud detection system targeting ghost student schemes that exploit fabricated or stolen identities in FAFSA applications.

item.title: Fetterman Backs White House Ballroom Proposal Following Correspondents' Dinner Shooting
item.description: Sen. Fetterman, breaking from most Democrats, voiced support for a White House ballroom following a close-call shooting at the Washington correspondents' dinner.

item.title: Alleged White House Correspondents' Dinner Shooter Arraigned in Federal Court
